context: Tests whether the agent provides specific, actionable code review feedback by referencing line numbers and suggesting concrete alternatives, rather than giving vague high-level observations.

checklist.name: Leads with positives
checklist.description: The review opens with at least one thing the code does well before listing issues

checklist.name: Line numbers referenced
checklist.description: At least two separate comments reference a specific line number (e.g., 'line 5', 'L12', or equivalent) rather than describing location vaguely

checklist.name: Alternatives suggested
checklist.description: At least two comments include a suggested alternative — either a code snippet, a renamed identifier, or an explicit recommendation of what to use instead

checklist.name: Readability issue identified
checklist.description: The review calls out at least one readability problem: generic/unclear name, overly large function, or deeply nested logic

checklist.name: Readability fix suggested
checklist.description: The readability comment includes a concrete alternative name or refactoring suggestion

checklist.name: Test coverage raised
checklist.description: The review mentions that test coverage is missing or insufficient for the new logic

checklist.name: Blocking issue labeled
checklist.description: At least one comment is explicitly labeled as blocking or must-fix

checklist.name: Nit labeled
checklist.description: At least one minor comment is labeled 'Nit:' to distinguish it from blocking concerns

checklist.name: One concern per comment
checklist.description: No single comment bundles two or more distinct concerns together
